'''chashada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pocket|pocket]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-sh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pocket|pocket]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chashada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæshædæth|chæshædæth]] || [[word:chæshædæj|chæshædæj]] || [[word:chæshædæsh|chæshædæsh]] || [[word:chæshædæ|chæshædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chashashadath|chashashadath]] || [[word:chashashadaj|chashashadaj]] || [[word:chashashadash|chashashadash]] || [[word:chashashada|chashashada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chashadath|chashadath]] || [[word:chashadaj|chashadaj]] || [[word:chashadash|chashadash]] || [[word:chashada|chashada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chashafdath|chashafdath]] || [[word:chashafdaj|chashafdaj]] || [[word:chashafdash|chashafdash]] || [[word:chashafdaf|chashafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chashadatha|chashadatha]] || [[word:chashadaja|chashadaja]] || [[word:chashadasha|chashadasha]] || [[word:chashadaka|chashadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chashadath|chashadath]] || [[word:chashadaj|chashadaj]] || [[word:chashadash|chashadash]] || [[word:chashada|chashada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chashadathal|chashadathal]] || [[word:chashadajal|chashadajal]] || [[word:chashadashal|chashadashal]] || [[word:chashadakal|chashadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chashadathatha|chashadathatha]] || [[word:chashadajaja|chashadajaja]] || [[word:chashadashasha|chashadashasha]] || [[word:chashadaka|chashadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chashadathan|chashadathan]] || [[word:chashadajan|chashadajan]] || [[word:chashadashan|chashadashan]] || [[word:chashadakan|chashadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chashadathaoro|chashadathaoro]] || [[word:chashadajaoro|chashadajaoro]] || [[word:chashadashaoro|chashadashaoro]] || [[word:chashadakaoro|chashadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
